statement: In every magma, Equation 1600 (`x = (y * z) * (z * (w * z))`) implies Equation 3437 (`x * y = z * (w * (y * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0007
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op z (op w z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op w (op y z)))
